# Everything in Perspective - Full Content

Canonical Origin: https://everythinginperspective.github.io

## Articles

### Gemini and the AI Landscape: Beyond ChatGPT's First-Mover Advantage

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/gemini-ai-competition/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/6/2026

ChatGPT won the public narrative. But the actual AI competition is far more nuanced—and OpenAI's dominance is fragile. What Gemini, Claude, and others are doing differently.

### Google Maps: How Location Data Reshapes Urban Planning, Privacy, and Power

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/google-maps-privacy-urban/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/6/2026

Google Maps promised directions. It delivered unprecedented surveillance of human movement. What location data reveals—and who has access to it.

### Instagram and Mental Health: The Hidden Cost of Connection

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/instagram-mental-health/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/6/2026

Instagram promised connection. Instead, it delivered comparison, anxiety, and algorithmic manipulation. What research actually shows—and what the platform doesn't want you to know.

### Cricket's Global Obsession: Sport as Cultural Identity and Economic Power

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/crickets-global-obsession/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/5/2026

Why 3 billion people follow cricket—not as sport, but as cultural identity. How cricket became the largest sport by audience, revenue, and geopolitical influence.

### E-Commerce Giants: How Amazon and Flipkart Reshaped Retail and Labor

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/ecommerce-giants-market-dominance/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/5/2026

From disruption to dominance—how Amazon and Flipkart conquered retail markets, destroyed traditional merchants, and created a new underclass of gig workers.

### Gold as Inflation Hedge: When Precious Metals Matter (And When They Don't)

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/gold-inflation-hedge/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/5/2026

Why gold remains valuable in uncertain economies—not as get-rich-quick, but as inflation protection. Historical data, current context, and when to actually buy.

Published: 5/5/2026

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/satta-king-economic-desperation/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/5/2026

Understanding satta king's hold on millions—not as vice, but as rational choice under economic pressure. The systemic failures that make illegal gambling the only escape.

Author: Staff
Published: 5/5/2026

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/translation-globalization/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/5/2026

Source: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/magazine/articles/weather-climate-data-literacy/
Author: Staff
Published: 5/5/2026
